semantic_matched_intents.quote: Only make changes that are directly requested or clearly necessary.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't add features, refactor code, or make "improvements" beyond what was asked.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't add error handling, fallbacks, or validation for scenarios that can't happen.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't design for hypothetical future requirements.

semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write docs, README, or summary files unless explicitly asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: You must only create documentation files if explicitly requested by the user.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write docs, README, or summary files unless explicitly asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Be concise in your explanations - focus on what's important rather than explaining obvious details.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and does not narrate internal deliberation by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Only add inline comments for exceptionally complex logic.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already only writes a comment when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Every time a test has been updated, run that singular test.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Run the minimal number of tests, using an appropriate filter, before finalizing.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: NO uploading, sharing, or transmitting to third parties. Do not send files, data, or analysis to any external service, URL, endpoint, or API beyond Anthropic. This includes: pasting data into web tools, sending via third-party APIs, attaching to external services, or any form of outbound data transfer.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not upload sensitive content to third-party services by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: The terminal output should be concise — hit the key points and tell the user the HTML report has the full details.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers whose length matches the task by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Keep it sharp — one screen of content that a busy team member can absorb in 2 minutes. No filler.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers whose length matches the task by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: If they ask about a specific area (e.g., "tell me more about the cash flow situation"), only expand on that area — don't dump the entire deep dive.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers whose length matches the task, and does not add features beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Skip ratios that don't apply (e.g., don't compute P/E for a private company, don't compute inventory turnover for a services business).
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: If you had to explain this company to a smart friend in 60 seconds, what would you say? This should be the single most useful paragraph in the entire analysis.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers whose length matches the task by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Only run them when the user explicitly selects them.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Skip any that can't be computed (e.g., don't compute Altman Z-Score for a bank — it wasn't designed for financial institutions).
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Adapt to the business: a bank, a manufacturer, a SaaS company, and a media startup all need different analytical emphasis. Don't apply a one-size-fits-all template.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No comments in source except one-liner `//` for non-obvious WHY. No decorative banners, no block comments, no docstrings on internal/private. Names and structure must be self-documenting.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes why-not-what comments and avoids multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No emojis, no "cute" messages.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not use emojis unless asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Use `size() > 0` instead and add a comment explaining why.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Comment only when reading the code is not enough — invariants that aren't visible in this method, cross-cutting ordering, why a non-obvious branch exists, why a seemingly redundant call is required.
